conflicts.description: DOC2 requires umbrella agent source and tests to be ephemeral Stage B artifacts created in a temp workspace and deleted after the milestone run. The real repository has permanent files under examples/umbrella_agent/.
conflicts.safe_resolution: Formal accepted addendum declaring permanent example source as a stricter accepted exception with detection mechanisms (provenance manifest, file origin classification, source hash before/after). The governed-pipeline proof remains sound because pipeline artifacts are still ephemeral and generated through registered steps.
conflicts.justification: Permanent example source is necessary as reference implementation, documentation, and regression baseline. It is excluded from the pipeline temp workspace, classified as 'reference' in provenance, and guarded by hash-before/after checks. The addendum is recorded at reports/umbrella_agent/umbrella_ephemeral_boundary_reconciliation.json and reports/umbrella_agent/umbrella_ephemeral_boundary_reconciliation.md. Manual insertion is detected via provenance manifest, file origin classification, and source hash comparison.

conflicts.description: DOC5 requires canonical path benchmarks/scriptor/. Current repository uses benchmarks/benchcore/ as the Scriptor benchmark pack (renamed).
conflicts.safe_resolution: Path mapping report at benchmarks/scriptor_path_mapping_report.md and benchmarks/scriptor_path_mapping_report.json maps every canonical Scriptor artifact path to its benchcore equivalent. All 32 PDFs inventoried, all requirements satisfied.
conflicts.justification: The Scriptor benchmark pack was renamed to benchcore in this repository. The path-mapping report proves all canonical Scriptor artifacts exist under accepted equivalent paths. The user confirmed this mapping is accepted ('the scriptor is called benchcore').
